{{< include /_macros.qmd >}}

# State-Space Models and Mamba {#sec-state-space-mamba}

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
## In this chapter
<!-- The leading challenger to attention: linear-time sequence models with a
     recurrent state. The idea, and what it buys over O(n^2) attention. -->
:::

**Learning objectives.**

<!-- TODO -->
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Sequence models with state

<!-- Linear state-space models: a continuous system, discretized; the
     convolutional vs. recurrent views. -->

## From S4 to selective state spaces

<!-- Why fixed dynamics limit content-awareness; Mamba's input-dependent
     (selective) parameters [@gu2023mamba]. -->

## The hardware angle

<!-- The parallel scan; how Mamba stays fast on GPUs. Ties back to
     @sec-hardware-lottery. -->

## Trade-offs vs. attention

<!-- Recall vs. compression; where each wins; hybrids. -->

## Exercises {.unnumbered}

<!-- TODO -->

## Further reading {.unnumbered}
